case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO INVESTIGATION VS TIERNAN GERALD J. INC.

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO INVESTIGATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TIERNAN GERALD J. INC. $1,600.00 PRINCIPAL, $47.29 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,647.29 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
